markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Explore potential investment and partnership opportunities between Webflow Ventures and growthx.ai](https://fathom.video/share/i6aggce2fksJ-JgczBcXMWzM_oT5R5RX?tab=summary&timestamp=189.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [growthx.ai is a rapidly growing, capital-efficient content marketing platform with strong synergies to Webflow's ecosystem](https://fathom.video/share/i6aggce2fksJ-JgczBcXMWzM_oT5R5RX?tab=summary&timestamp=221.0)
  - [Currently raising a small SAFE round at $250M cap (10% discount), with \~$3M committed from strategic investors](https://fathom.video/share/i6aggce2fksJ-JgczBcXMWzM_oT5R5RX?tab=summary&timestamp=1265.0)
  - [Existing collaborations with Webflow include co-marketing, events, and product integration discussions](https://fathom.video/share/i6aggce2fksJ-JgczBcXMWzM_oT5R5RX?tab=summary&timestamp=121.0)
  - [growthx.ai offers valuable insights into customer needs and market trends due to deep integration with client teams](https://fathom.video/share/i6aggce2fksJ-JgczBcXMWzM_oT5R5RX?tab=summary&timestamp=1151.0)

## Topics

### Company Overview: growthx.ai

  - [Platform for end-to-end content marketing, combining strategy, tools, and execution](https://fathom.video/share/i6aggce2fksJ-JgczBcXMWzM_oT5R5RX?tab=summary&timestamp=449.0)
  - [Growing rapidly: $3M to $12M revenue in 2023, projecting $15M EOY and $45M+ in 2024](https://fathom.video/share/i6aggce2fksJ-JgczBcXMWzM_oT5R5RX?tab=summary&timestamp=1265.0)
  - [Cashflow positive, capital-efficient model](https://fathom.video/share/i6aggce2fksJ-JgczBcXMWzM_oT5R5RX?tab=summary&timestamp=221.0)
  - [Primary competition is in-house teams, not direct product competitors](https://fathom.video/share/i6aggce2fksJ-JgczBcXMWzM_oT5R5RX?tab=summary&timestamp=449.0)
  - [Go-to-market strategy primarily word-of-mouth, recently hired first salesperson](https://fathom.video/share/i6aggce2fksJ-JgczBcXMWzM_oT5R5RX?tab=summary&timestamp=889.0)

### Synergies with Webflow

  - [\~1/3 of growthx.ai customers use Webflow](https://fathom.video/share/i6aggce2fksJ-JgczBcXMWzM_oT5R5RX?tab=summary&timestamp=105.0)
  - [Complementary to CMS workflows, addressing content decay and quality issues](https://fathom.video/share/i6aggce2fksJ-JgczBcXMWzM_oT5R5RX?tab=summary&timestamp=320.0)
  - [Potential for deeper technical integrations, co-selling opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/i6aggce2fksJ-JgczBcXMWzM_oT5R5RX?tab=summary&timestamp=706.0)
  - [growthx.ai's insights valuable for Webflow's product development and market understanding](https://fathom.video/share/i6aggce2fksJ-JgczBcXMWzM_oT5R5RX?tab=summary&timestamp=1151.0)

### Investment Round Details

  - [Raising on SAFE terms: $250M valuation cap, 10% discount](https://fathom.video/share/i6aggce2fksJ-JgczBcXMWzM_oT5R5RX?tab=summary&timestamp=1265.0)
  - [\~$3M committed, including HubSpot Ventures](https://fathom.video/share/i6aggce2fksJ-JgczBcXMWzM_oT5R5RX?tab=summary&timestamp=1265.0)
  - [In discussions with Salesforce Ventures](https://fathom.video/share/i6aggce2fksJ-JgczBcXMWzM_oT5R5RX?tab=summary&timestamp=1220.0)
  - [Aiming to close by end of next week](https://fathom.video/share/i6aggce2fksJ-JgczBcXMWzM_oT5R5RX?tab=summary&timestamp=1220.0)

### Webflow Ventures Investment Approach

  - [Typically small checks (\~$200K), non-lead investor](https://fathom.video/share/i6aggce2fksJ-JgczBcXMWzM_oT5R5RX?tab=summary&timestamp=1025.0)
  - [Value-add: brand halo effect, org access, co-marketing priority, potential co-selling](https://fathom.video/share/i6aggce2fksJ-JgczBcXMWzM_oT5R5RX?tab=summary&timestamp=1056.0)
  - [Focus on complementary companies betting on Webflow ecosystem](https://fathom.video/share/i6aggce2fksJ-JgczBcXMWzM_oT5R5RX?tab=summary&timestamp=1131.0)

### Next Steps for Potential Investment

  - [Dan to discuss internally with Webflow team](https://fathom.video/share/i6aggce2fksJ-JgczBcXMWzM_oT5R5RX?tab=summary&timestamp=1327.0)
  - [Marcel open to providing additional information if needed](https://fathom.video/share/i6aggce2fksJ-JgczBcXMWzM_oT5R5RX?tab=summary&timestamp=1249.0)
  - [Existing relationships (e.g., Rachel) can provide further due diligence](https://fathom.video/share/i6aggce2fksJ-JgczBcXMWzM_oT5R5RX?tab=summary&timestamp=1249.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Dan to review opportunity with Webflow Ventures team](https://fathom.video/share/i6aggce2fksJ-JgczBcXMWzM_oT5R5RX?tab=summary&timestamp=1327.0)
  - [Webflow to decide on potential investment and communicate decision ASAP](https://fathom.video/share/i6aggce2fksJ-JgczBcXMWzM_oT5R5RX?tab=summary&timestamp=1327.0)
  - [Regardless of investment, both parties to continue exploring co-marketing and partnership opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/i6aggce2fksJ-JgczBcXMWzM_oT5R5RX?tab=summary&timestamp=1327.0)
